title: optimizer treats all the functions with no or constant parameters as constant
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1 (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255));
SELECT gen_random_uuid() AS id_uuid, gen_random_uuid() AS value_uuid FROM test1;
CREATE TABLE test2 (num INTEGER, str VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'default');
INSERT INTO test2 (num, str) VALUES (NULL, NULL), (3, 'test3');
key_bug_features: optimizer treats functions with constant parameters as constants
